title: CLI: Multi-Token Org-Scoped Config
description: Redesign CLI config for multiple org tokens with local switching

steps.title: OrgEntry and MultiTokenConfig types
steps.description: New types for multi-token config: each OrgEntry has orgId, orgName, token, url, and optional alias. MultiTokenConfig wraps the orgs array with currentOrg pointer.

steps.title: loadConfig — env-var path unchanged
steps.description: Lines 44-49 are the env-var path — completely unchanged. HELIX_API_KEY/HELIX_INSPECT_TOKEN + HELIX_URL take priority over config file.

steps.title: loadConfig — multi-token resolution
steps.description: If config has orgs array, find entry matching currentOrg. Single-org convenience: if only 1 entry and no currentOrg, use it. Returns compatible HxConfig.

steps.title: addOrgEntry — add/replace with alias uniqueness
steps.description: Reads config, validates alias uniqueness, replaces entry with same orgId or appends. Sets currentOrg if makeCurrent or no current exists.

steps.title: maskToken — security helper
steps.description: Returns hxi_<first8>... to avoid printing full tokens in output.

steps.title: cmdTokenAdd — token validation flow
steps.description: Parses flags, validates hxi_ prefix, calls /api/auth/me with temp config, extracts org from response, stores via addOrgEntry. Fails without writing config on any error.

steps.title: cmdOrgList — local-only
steps.description: No config parameter, no hxFetch. Reads getOrgEntries() and loadRawConfig() directly. Shows alias and current marker.

steps.title: cmdOrgSwitch — multi-token local switch
steps.description: For hxi_ tokens: resolves input against local entries by orgId, alias, then case-insensitive orgName. JWT path unchanged.

steps.title: token command wiring
steps.description: New token case dispatches to runToken. Does NOT call requireConfig() — token add creates config.
